description: Cantor Equity Partners V, Inc. focuses on effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses in the financial services, healthcare, real estate services, technology and software industries. The company was formerly known as CF International Acquisition Corp. VII. The company was incorporated in 2021 and is based in New York, New York.
